'''kalungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yoctogramme|yoctogramme]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-l-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yoctogramme|yoctogramme]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kalungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kælingith|kælingith]] || [[word:kælingij|kælingij]] || [[word:kælingish|kælingish]] || [[word:kælingi|kælingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kalulunguth|kalulunguth]] || [[word:kalulunguj|kalulunguj]] || [[word:kalulungush|kalulungush]] || [[word:kalulungu|kalulungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kalunguth|kalunguth]] || [[word:kalunguj|kalunguj]] || [[word:kalungush|kalungush]] || [[word:kalungu|kalungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kalufnguth|kalufnguth]] || [[word:kalufnguj|kalufnguj]] || [[word:kalufngush|kalufngush]] || [[word:kalufnguf|kalufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kalunguthu|kalunguthu]] || [[word:kalunguju|kalunguju]] || [[word:kalungushu|kalungushu]] || [[word:kalunguku|kalunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kalunguth|kalunguth]] || [[word:kalunguj|kalunguj]] || [[word:kalungush|kalungush]] || [[word:kalungu|kalungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kalunguthul|kalunguthul]] || [[word:kalungujul|kalungujul]] || [[word:kalungushul|kalungushul]] || [[word:kalungukul|kalungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kalunguthuthu|kalunguthuthu]] || [[word:kalungujuju|kalungujuju]] || [[word:kalungushushu|kalungushushu]] || [[word:kalunguku|kalunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kalunguthun|kalunguthun]] || [[word:kalungujun|kalungujun]] || [[word:kalungushun|kalungushun]] || [[word:kalungukun|kalungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kalunguthuoro|kalunguthuoro]] || [[word:kalungujuoro|kalungujuoro]] || [[word:kalungushuoro|kalungushuoro]] || [[word:kalungukuoro|kalungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
